ABOUT 
Welcome to the Persona minting event!

Persona is a state-of-the-art avatar collection at the heart of the Unagi gaming ecosystem. Inspired by a retro anime aesthetic that we cherish, Persona stands as the flagship brand of Unagi's entire ecosystem.

Total Supply: 8,888
Whitelist sale supply: 2,400
Public sale (auction) supply: 5,823
